description: Thumbnail grid with lightbox viewer. Progressive enhancement: thumbnails link to full images without JS. With JS, opens a fullscreen dialog with navigation, swipe, keyboard, and View Transitions.

attributes.name: columns
attributes.description: Minimum column width for the thumbnail grid.

attributes.name: controls
attributes.description: Lightbox control layout. 'edge' puts prev/next on sides with floating header. 'bar' puts all controls in a top bar. 'minimal' shows close only (swipe/keyboard for nav).

attributes.name: captions
attributes.description: Caption display in lightbox. 'auto' shows via popover button, 'overlay' shows persistent bar, 'hidden' suppresses.

attributes.name: transition
attributes.description: View Transition type. 'morph' animates thumbnail to full image, 'fade' cross-fades, 'none' disables.

structure.description: Image-only item: anchor wrapping a thumbnail img.
Rich item: figure wrapping an anchor and figcaption.
Thumbnail image inside anchor. src is the thumbnail, parent anchor href is the full image.
Optional caption inside figure. Supports HTML including links.
